case_title: 731 MARKET, LTD. VS. WILSON MCHENRY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 731 MARKET, LTD. A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED MAR-05-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON MCHENRY COMPANY
